LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE'S MOTION TO RECLASSIFY UNLIMITED CIVIL CASE TO LIMITED CIVIL CASE IS CONTINUED TO 4/23/18 AT 9:30 AM. OPPOSITION DUE BY 4/5/18, REPLY DUE BY 4/23/18. IF AN OPPOSITION IS NOT FILED BY 4/5/18, THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. (D302/HK)

LAW AND MOTION 302,DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE'S, MOTION TO RECLASSIFY UNLIMITED CIVIL CASE TO LIMITED CIVIL CASE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. AT THE HEARING ON THIS MOTION ON MARCH 14, 2018 THE COURT STATED THAT, IF NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED BY APRIL 5, 2018, THE MOTION WOULD BE GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. PUBLIC STORAGE'S REQUEST TO TRANSFER THE CASE TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT IS DENIED SINCE PLAINTIFF JOHN CALDER APPARENTLY DESIRES TO BE REPRESENTED BY COUNSEL. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, E-MAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.ORG (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-24-2018 Assigned To Arbitration On Jul-09-18

Defendant Public Storages Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify Unlimited Civil Case To Limited Civil Case
Off Calendar Apr-23-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE's, Motion To Reclassify Unlimited Civil Case To Limited Civil Case is GRANTED. No opposition filed. At the hearing on this motion on March 14, 2018 the court stated that, if no opposition was filed by April 5, 2018, the motion would be granted as unopposed. Public Storage's request to transfer the case to small claims court is denied since plaintiff John Calder apparently desires to be represented by counsel. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, e-mail: torreanom@aol.org (L&M302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2018 Continued To Jun-13-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Public Storages Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify Unlimited Civil Case To Limited Civil Case
Off Calendar Mar-14-2018 Continued To Apr-23-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marc Libarle, Esq. 415-982-2400 for Plaintiff John Calder.
Lisa Friend, Esq. for Defendant Public Storage through Court Call.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court addresses Plaintiff that No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff requests to continue. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE's Motion To Reclassify Unlimited Civil Case To Limited Civil Case.

Continued to 4/23/18 at 9:30 am. Opposition due by 4/5/18, Reply due by 4/23/18. If an Opposition is not filed by 4/5/18, the motion will be granted as Unopposed.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)
